name: qa
description: QA-test any website or app with a real browser and return a 1-5 score with evidence. Drives a Browser Use cloud browser (tunnels localhost automatically). Requires the browser-harness CLI.

interface.shortDescription: QA-test a site or app and return a 1-5 score with evidence.
interface.longDescription: Drives a real Browser Use cloud browser to test a website or app and return a 1-5 quality score (5 = flawless, 1 = broken) with evidence. Tunnels a localhost dev server automatically. Run as /qa <url-or-localhost-port>. Requires the browser-harness CLI (a one-time uv/pip install).
